name: Tupy S.A.
summary: Tupy S.A., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells iron casting products in Brazil, the Americas, Europe, and Asia. The company operates through Transportation, Infrastructure & Agriculture; and Hydraulics segments. It offers engine blocks, cylinder heads, brakes, transmission, steering, axle, and suspension components for the manufacturers of engines, passenger vehicles, commercial vehicles, construction machines, tractors, agricultural machines, and power generators; and machining services. The company also provides flexible iron connections for the construction industry; and malleable cast iron pipe fittings for the residential, commercial, and industrial uses, as well as for the transportation of liquids, gases, and fumes. In addition, it offers continuous cast bars under the FUCO and Versa-Bar brand names for the hydraulic and pneumatic systems, glass making, machines and equipment, automotive, and other applications. Tupy S.A. was founded in 1938 and is headquartered in Joinville, Brazil.
